name: confide
description: CONFIDE — local-first de-identification toolkit for session transcripts. Skills: confide:setup (install deps + choose preferences), confide:anon (redact PII locally + emit a reversible map), confide:red (residual re-identification risk check), confide:rehydrate (restore real values into a cloud analysis locally), confide:view (interactive HTML redaction diff), confide:audit (stats-only corpus PII scan), confide:vault (three-locks encrypted storage), confide:annotate (gold set + inter-annotator agreement). Privacy-first; raw text and the reversible map never leave the machine.
